description: The project has received three bids for the electrical installation package. The procurement manager must evaluate them and recommend a winner.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the three submitted bids and the project's technical and commercial requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers all the necessary documents for the evaluation.

nodes.task_description: Perform a technical evaluation to ensure all bidders meet the minimum requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all three bidders are technically qualified.

nodes.task_description: Perform a commercial evaluation, comparing the prices, and recommend awarding the contract to the lowest-priced, technically acceptable bidder.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compares the prices, identifies the lowest bidder, and creates a formal recommendation for award.
